Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A textual approximation of a Pseudo BPMN process representing a multinational smartphone supply chain from market research to sales cycle monitoring Task Generate 20 open ended thought provoking questions based on this process Topics Rationale behind process flows potential improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement Constraint Do NOT provide any SQL queries Just list the questions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Process Flow Start Market Research to RD Prototype Procurement Parallel sourcing of components Microprocessors Cameras Screens Sensors from specific regions Logistics Ship to Malaysia Assembly Manufacturing 24 7 Assembly to Quality Check Exclusive Gateway Pass Fail Packaging Pack and Label Distribution Split into Air Freight High Demand versus Cargo Ship Other Compliance Customs Regulatory Receiving Regional Distribution Centers Last Mile Split into Warehousing Retail E Commerce VIP Pre Orders Monitoring Inventory Sales Forecast to Decision Adjust Orders or Proceed End Next Sales Cycle

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Brainstorming Categories for Questions Strategic Rationale Why this flow Why these regions Why Malaysia Risk Management Supply chain disruptions geopolitical issues quality failures Process Improvement Bottlenecks parallelization automation Decision Making The Exclusive Gateways Quality Adjust Orders Stakeholder Communication Suppliers Customers Internal Teams Performance Measurement KPIs for each stage Sustainability Ethics Sourcing Carbon footprint

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting Questions Iterative Process Idea 1 Sourcing Why specific countries for components to How does geopolitical stability influence the selection of specific component suppliers in Taiwan Japan and South Korea Idea 2 Parallelism Why parallel sourcing to Does splitting component procurement into parallel tasks reduce lead time significantly or does it increase coordination overhead Idea 3 Assembly Location Why Malaysia to What strategic advantages does the assembly plant in Malaysia offer compared to other potential locations in the region

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Idea 4 Quality Loop The rework loop to How does the Rework or Scrap decision impact overall cost of goods sold and time to market Idea 5 Logistics Split Air vs Ship to How is the decision made between Air Freight and Cargo Ship and what are the trade offs regarding carbon footprint vs speed Idea 6 Customs Customs clearance to How are regulatory compliance tasks managed across different regional distribution centers with varying import laws

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Idea 7 Distribution Split Last mile options to How does the process handle the conflicting priorities of bulk retail distribution versus direct VIP shipments Idea 8 Monitoring Sales forecast to What data sources feed into the Monitor Inventory and Sales Forecast task to ensure accuracy Idea 9 Feedback Loop Adjust Orders to If demand changes how quickly can the system trigger the Adjust Orders to Suppliers task without disrupting ongoing shipments

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Idea 10 RD Market research to How does the output of the initial Market Research task directly influence the RD design specifications Idea 11 24 7 Ops Assembly to What are the operational challenges and labor implications of maintaining a 24 7 assembly operation Idea 12 Risk Component security to How does the process mitigate the risk of supply chain disruption for single source components like microprocessors

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Idea 13 Stakeholders Communication to How is communication structured between the regional distribution centers and the central supply chain management during the Receive phase Idea 14 KPIs Measurement to Which key performance indicators would best measure the efficiency of the Parallel Gateway splits in the distribution phase Idea 15 Sustainability Environment to How can the process be redesigned to minimize the environmental impact of the Air Freight vs Cargo Ship split

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Idea 16 Scalability Growth to If demand doubles which step in the current process becomes the primary bottleneck Idea 17 Tech Automation to Where could automation be introduced in the Quality Checks and Diagnostics task to reduce human error Idea 18 Flexibility Customization to How does the current process accommodate last minute customization requests before the Pack and Label stage Idea 19 Cost Trade offs to What are the financial implications of the Rework or Scrap loop on the overall project margin Idea 20 End Game Cycle to How is the Next Sales Cycle defined and what triggers the transition from the current End Event to the next Start Event

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Refine Check against constraints 20 questions Yes Open ended Yes Thought provoking Yes No SQL Yes Ensure variety in topics Risk Process Strategy etc Refine wording to be more professional and probing

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refining Q1 Instead of Why specific countries ask about geopolitical risk mitigation Refining Q4 Focus on the loop efficiency Refining Q5 Focus on the decision matrix for logistics Refining Q9 Focus on the agility of the feedback loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final Polish Ensure no markdown code blocks for the questions list itself just a list but the prompt asked to list the questions I will present them as a numbered list Wait checking the prompt again Do not provide any SQL queries just list the questions Okay I will output just the numbered list of questions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets make sure they are truly thought provoking Example How does the decision to split component procurement into parallel tasks impact the overall coordination overhead compared to the time saved Good Example In the context of the Exclusive Gateway for Quality Checks what thresholds define pass versus fail to minimize the rework loop without compromising brand reputation Good I will write 20 distinct questions covering the required themes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Check No SQL Just questions 20 questions Open ended Thought provoking Ready to generate output
